scripts.format: prettier --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .dependency-cruiser.cjs .github/workflows/validate.yml core services tools IMPLEMENTATION-M0.md
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .dependency-cruiser.cjs .github/workflows/validate.yml core services tools IMPLEMENTATION-M0.md
